ground_truth.summary: Chunked remote read closes the querier too early; the returned iterators can then access memory-mapped files that have already been closed (use-after-close).

human_threads.note: no inline review comments on the PR

ground_truth.caveat: no human review threads; crispest bug ground truth of the Go-small candidates (named root cause, cross-release backports, dedicated reproducer #14599)
